observation.summary: Real provider CLI availability and integration status are observed through a scheduled/manual evidence artifact.

hypothesis.summary: Public runners may have no provider CLIs, but that must be recorded as observed skip rather than invisible absence.

execution.summary: Run the provider observation tool with integration enabled and upload the evidence JSON artifact.

evaluation.summary: Missing executables produce skipped evidence; detected providers must pass TestIntegration or fail the workflow.

retrospective.summary: Provider matrix wording points to generated observation evidence instead of a future unscheduled idea.

evidence.proves: provider observation docs are generated from the manifest
public CI records scheduled/manual real CLI observation artifacts
